parse.title: Youmuu's Ghostblade
parse.wikitext:
: ''For the removed {{ai|Living Forge|Ornn|Masterwork}} items, see {{ii|Youmuu's Wake}} and {{ii|Youmuu's Wraithblade}}.''
{{Item info
|goldvalue = 
{{gold value|Haunt Gold Value|nolink=}}
* 20 flat [[movement speed]] = {{g|{{#vardefineecho:haunt|{{#expr:{{#var:msflat}}*20}}}}}}
** '''Total Gold Value''' = {{g|{{#vardefineecho:haunttotal|{{#expr:{{#var:total}}+{{#var:haunt}}}}}}}}
{{gold value|Wraith Step Gold Value|nolink=}}
* {{rd|20%|15%}} [[movement speed]] = {{rd|{{g|{{#vardefineecho:wraithmelee|{{#expr:{{#var:ms}}*20}}}}}}|{{g|{{#vardefineecho:wraithranged|{{#expr:{{#var:ms}}*15}}}}}}}}
|goldefficiency =
* While {{sbc|Haunt}} is active, {{ii|Youmuu's Ghostblade}} becomes {{gec|Youmuu's Ghostblade|{{#var:haunttotal}}}} gold efficient.
* While {{sbc|Wraith Step}} is active {{iis|Youmuu's Ghostblade}} gold efficiency is increased by {{rd|+{{gec|Youmuu's Ghostblade|+{{#var:wraithmelee}}}}|+{{gec|Youmuu's Ghostblade|+{{#var:wraithranged}}}}}}.
|similaritems = Edge of Night;Axiom Arc;Hubris;Voltaic Cyclosword;The Collector;Umbral Glaive;Serpent's Fang;Profane Hydra;Bastionbreaker
|background = 
|notes =
* {{sbc|Wraith Step}} is an [[auto-targeted]] effect.
* {{sbc|Wraith Step's}} cast does not break {{tip|stealth}}.
* {{sbc|Wraith Step}} has no cast time.
* {{sbc|Wraith Step's}} percentage movement speed [[stacking#Champion statistic stacking|stacks]] additively with other sources of percentage movement speed.
|strategy = 
|trivia = 
* This item is a reference to [https://en.touhouwiki.net/wiki/Youmu_Konpaku Youmu Konpaku] from the '''Touhou Project''' series.
* The active buff granted by {{ii|Youmuu's Ghostblade}} is named {{ii|Youmuu's Ghostblade|Poltergeist's Ascension}}.
[[File:Ionia Crest icon.png|link=Ionia#Trivia|100px|center]]
|quotes = 
|media = 
<gallery captionalign="center" orientation="square" spacing="small">
Youmuu's Ghostblade passive moving VFX.png|Moving VFX
Youmuu's Ghostblade activation VFX.png|Active VFX
Youmuu's Ghostblade running VFX.png|Running VFX
Youmuu's Ghostblade screenshot.png|Old Item VFX
Youmuu's Ghostblade 2 screenshot.png|Old Running VFX
</gallery>
|sfx = 
;Activation
: ''The activation sound is slightly pitched down by the audio engine in-game.''
* {{sm2|Youmuu's Ghostblade active SFX 2.ogg}} Active SFX

;Effect Active
* {{sm2|Youmuu's Ghostblade active SFX 3.ogg}} Active SFX

;Effect Ends
* {{sm2|Youmuu's Ghostblade active SFX.ogg}} Active SFX
|revisions = 
|patchhistory = 
;[[V14.23]]
* Haunt movement speed reduced to {{rd|20|10}} from 20 for all users.
* Wraith Step duration reduced to {{rd|6|4}} seconds from 6 for all users.

;[[V14.22]]
* {{sbc|New recipe:}} {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Rectrix}} + {{ii|Long Sword}} + {{g|675}} = {{g|2800}}
** {{sbc|Old recipe:}} {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Rectrix}} + {{ii|Pickaxe}} + {{g|150}} = {{g|2800}}
* Attack damage reduced to 55 from 60.
* Movement speed increased to 4% from 0%.

;[[V14.19]]
* {{sbc|New Recipe:}} {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Rectrix}} + {{ii|Pickaxe}} + {{g|150}} = {{g|2800}}.
** {{sbc|Old Recipe:}} {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Rectrix}} + {{g|800}} = {{g|2700}}.
* Haunt bonus movement speed reduced to 20 for all users from {{rd|40|20}}.

;[[V14.11]]
* Can no longer be upgraded to {{ii|Youmuu's Wake}}.

;[[V14.6]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Wraith Step and Haunt tooltips now properly display their respective ranged modifier instead of erroneous placeholders.

;[[V14.3]]
* Haunt out-of-combat movement speed changed to {{rd|40|20}} from 40 for all users.
* Wraith Step bonus movement speed changed to {{rd|20%|15%}} from 20% for all users.

;[[V14.1]]
* {{sbc|New:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Rectrix}} + {{g|800}} = {{g|2700}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 60 attack damage, 18 lethality.
** {{sbc|Unique Active - Wraith Step:}} Gain {{as|20% '''bonus''' movement speed|ms}} and {{tip|ghosted|ghosting}} for 6 seconds (45 second cooldown).
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Haunt:}} Gain {{as|40 '''bonus''' movement speed|ms}} while out-of-combat with enemy champions for 3 seconds.
** Limited to 1 '''Youmuu's Ghostblade'''.
** {{cai|Living Forge|Ornn|Masterwork}} item: {{ii|Youmuu's Wake}}.
*** {{sbc|Stats:}} 75 attack damage, 26 lethality.
* {{sbc|Old:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Caulfield's Warhammer}} + {{g|900}} = {{g|3100}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 60 attack damage, 15 ability haste, 18 lethality.
** {{sbc|Unique Active - Wraith Step:}} Gain {{as|25% '''bonus''' movement speed}} and {{tip|ghosted|ghosting}} for 6 seconds (45 second cooldown).
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Haunt:}} While moving, generate 1 ''Spectral Shard'' for every 55 units travelled. Gain {{as|{{fd|0.4}} '''bonus''' movement speed}} while out-of-combat for every ''Spectral Shard'', up to {{as|40 '''bonus''' movement speed}} with 100 ''Spectral Shards''. At maximum shards, also gain {{as|{{pp|7;8 to 18 for 11|1;8 to 18}} lethality}}. Dealing damage to an enemy champion causes ''Spectral Shards'' to reset after 3 seconds.
** {{sbc|Mythic Passive:}} Empowers each of your other Legendary items with {{as|7 '''bonus''' attack damage}}.
** Limited to 1 {{sbc|Mythic}} item.
** {{cai|Living Forge|Ornn|Masterwork}} item: {{ii|Youmuu's Wake}}.
*** {{sbc|Stats:}} 75 attack damage, 20 ability haste, 26 lethality.
** {{sbc|Caption:}} "The dearly beloved gathered, but soon there would be much more to mourn."

;[[V13.20]]
* Haunt lethality increased to {{pp|7;8 to 18 for 11|1;8 to 18}} from {{pp|3;4 to 12|1;8;10;12 to 18 for 7}}.

;[[V13.11]]
* Ability haste reduced to 15 from 20.
* Haunt lethality reduced to {{pp|3;4 to 12|1;8;10;12 to 18 for 7}} from {{pp|8;9 to 20 for 12|1;7 to 18}}.
* Distance per shard increased to 55 units from 45.
* {{ii|Youmuu's Wake}} ability haste reduced to 20 from 25.

;[[V13.10]]
* {{sbc|New:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Caulfield's Warhammer}} + {{g|900}} = {{g|3100}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 60 attack damage, 20 ability haste, 18 lethality.
** {{sbc|Unique Active - Wraith Step:}} Gain {{as|25% '''bonus''' movement speed}} and {{tip|ghosted|ghosting}} for 6 seconds (45 second cooldown).
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Haunt:}} While moving, generate 1 ''Spectral Shard'' for every 45 units travelled. Gain {{as|1 '''bonus''' movement speed}} while out-of-combat for every 4 ''Spectral Shards'', up to {{as|40 '''bonus''' movement speed}} with 100 ''Spectral Shards''. At maximum shards, also gain {{as|{{pp|8;9 to 20 for 12|1;7 to 18}} lethality}}. Dealing damage to an enemy champion causes ''Spectral Shards'' to reset after 3 seconds.
** {{sbc|Mythic Passive:}} Empowers other Legendary items with {{as|7 '''bonus''' attack damage}}.
** Limited to 1 {{sbc|Mythic}} item.
** {{cai|Living Forge|Ornn|Masterwork}} item: {{ii|Youmuu's Wake}}.
*** {{sbc|Stats:}} 75 attack damage, 25 ability haste, 26 lethality.
* {{sbc|Old:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Caulfield's Warhammer}} + {{g|800}} = {{g|3000}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 55 attack damage, 15 ability haste, 18 lethality.
** {{sbc|Unique Active - Wraith Step:}} Gain {{as|20% '''bonus''' movement speed}} and {{tip|ghosted|ghosting}} for 6 seconds (45 second cooldown).
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Haunt:}} Gain {{as|40 '''bonus''' movement speed}} while out-of-combat.
** Limited to 1 '''Youmuu's Ghostblade'''.

;[[V12.7]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Cooldown indicator now accurately reflects the actual cooldown timer.

;[[V11.23]]
* Total cost increased to {{g|3000}} from {{g|2900}}.
** Combine cost increased to {{g|800}} from {{g|700}}.

;[[V11.17]]
* {{sbc|New Recipe:}} {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Caulfield's Warhammer}} + {{g|700}} = {{g|2900}}.
** {{sbc|Old Recipe:}} {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Pickaxe}} + {{g|1025}} = {{g|3000}}.
* Ability haste increased to 15 from 0.
* Attack damage reduced to 55 from 60.

;[[V10.23]]
* Updated icon.
* {{sbc|New:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Pickaxe}} + {{g|1025}} = {{g|3000}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 60 attack damage, 18 lethality.
** {{sbc|Unique Active - Wraith Step}} Gain +20% '''bonus''' movement speed and {{tip|ghosted|ghosting}} for 6 seconds (45 second cooldown).
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Haunt:}} +40 movement speed out-of-combat.
** Limited to 1 '''Youmuu's Ghostblade'''.
* {{sbc|Old:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Caulfield's Warhammer}} + {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{g|700}} = {{g|2900}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 55 attack damage, 10% cooldown reduction.
** {{sbc|Unique:}} +18 lethality.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive:}} +40 movement speed out-of-combat.
** {{sbc|Unique Active:}} Gain +20% movement speed and {{tip|ghosted|ghosting}} for 6 seconds (45 second cooldown).
** {{cai|Living Forge|Ornn|Masterwork}} item: {{ii|Youmuu's Wraithblade}}.
*** {{sbc|Stats:}} 75 attack damage, 10% cooldown reduction.
*** {{sbc|Unique:}} +25 lethality.

;[[V10.18]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Out-of-combat movement speed effect goes on cooldown when affected by CC effects.

;[[V9.23]]
* {{sbc|New Effect:}} Active now also grants {{tip|ghosted|ghosting}}.

;[[V9.1]]
* Added to recipe from {{ii|Youmuu's Wraithblade}}. ''Can only be forged by {{ci|Ornn}}.''

;[[V7.24b]]
* Lethality reduced to 18 from 20.

;[[V7.22]]
* Lethality increased to 20 from 18.

;[[V7.14]]
* Out of combat movement speed increased to 40 from 20.
* Lethality increased to 18 from 15.
* Attack damage reduced to 55 from 60.
* {{sbc|New Effect:}} Tooltip now states how much armor the item's lethality is currently negating.

;[[V7.4]]
* Lethality reduced to 15 from 20.

;[[V6.22]]
* Combine cost reduced to {{g|700}} from {{g|1000}}.
** Total cost reduced to {{g|2900}} from {{g|3200}}.
* Armor penetration reduced to 0 from 20.
* Active no longer grants 40% attack speed.
* {{sbc|New Unique Passive:}} +20 Lethality.
* {{sbc|New Unique Passive:}} +20 movement speed out of combat.

;[[V6.12]]
* Attack damage reduced to 60 from 65.

;[[V5.22]]
* {{sbc|New Recipe:}} {{ii|Caulfield's Warhammer}} + {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{g|1000}} = {{g|3200}}
** {{sbc|Old Recipe:}} {{ii|Avarice Blade}} + {{ii|The Brutalizer}} + {{g|563}} = {{g|2700}}
* Attack damage increased to 65 from 30.
* {{sbc|Removed:}} Critical strike chance reduced to 0% from 15%.

;[[V4.10]]
* Movement speed bonus on ranged champions increased to 6 seconds from 4.

;[[V3.14]]
* New icon.

;[[V1.0.0.153]]
* Flat armor penetration is now unique.

;[[V1.0.0.152]]
* Item cost increased to {{g|2700}} from {{g|2687}}.
* Combine cost reduced to {{g|563}} from {{g|600}}.
* Cooldown reduction reduced to 10% from 15%.
* Cooldown reduction is no longer unique.
* Armor penetration is no longer unique.
* Active attack speed bonus reduced to 40% from 50%.
* Active duration changed to 6 seconds for melee champions and 4 seconds for ranged from 4 seconds + 2 seconds per autoattack for melee champions (8 seconds max).

;[[V1.0.0.94]]
* Now properly considers {{ci|Cho'Gath}} and {{ci|Pantheon}} as melee.

;[[V1.0.0.83]] Added
* Recipe: {{ii|Avarice Blade}} + {{ii|The Brutalizer}} + {{g|600}} = {{g|2687}}
* Stats: +30 attack damage, +15% critical strike chance
* {{sbc|Unique Passive:}} +20 armor penetration
* {{sbc|Unique Passive:}} +15% cooldown reduction
* {{sbc|Unique Active:}} Gain 20% bonus movement speed and 50% bonus attack speed for 4 seconds. Attacking enemy units with melee attacks increases the duration by 2 to a maximum of 8 seconds. Cooldown: 60 seconds.
}}
